# Sellatica

> Custom AI systems integration partner for operations-heavy mid-market businesses.

## Canonical site
- https://www.sellatica.in/

## Primary pages
- Home: https://www.sellatica.in/
- Services: https://www.sellatica.in/services
- Solutions: https://www.sellatica.in/results
- About: https://www.sellatica.in/about
- FAQ: https://www.sellatica.in/faq
- Contact: https://www.sellatica.in/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://www.sellatica.in/privacy
- Terms & Conditions: https://www.sellatica.in/terms
- Refund & Cancellation: https://www.sellatica.in/refund

## What Sellatica offers
- Custom AI systems integration
- Workflow orchestration across existing tools
- Operations visibility and reporting architecture
- Deployment, enablement, and optimization support

## Ideal customer profile
- Mid-market businesses with active sales or delivery operations
- Teams with disconnected systems and manual handoffs
- Operators seeking predictable execution and reliable workflow control

## Contact
- Email: hello@sellatica.in
